title: OpenAI launches a self-serve ChatGPT Ads Manager
desc: Daily AI news satire. OpenAI opens a self-serve Ads Manager inside ChatGPT, after years of arguing that paying for ChatGPT meant the answers weren't shaped by advertisers.

beats.name: keeper-at-the-gate
beats.narration: For years, the promise of ChatGPT was a simple one - you came to it for a straight answer.

beats.name: the-pure-oracle
beats.narration: The company argued that was the whole point. You paid for it, so the answers weren't shaped by advertisers.

beats.name: the-no-gold-tablet
beats.narration: Advertising, by that logic, was a last resort.

beats.name: a-single-merchant-lantern
beats.narration: This year, the last resort arrived.

beats.name: the-keeper-opens-the-gate
beats.narration: In January, OpenAI began testing ads inside ChatGPT's free tier.

beats.name: stalls-bloom-in-the-courtyard
beats.narration: This month, it went further and launched a self-serve ad platform.

beats.name: the-bazaar-floods-the-hall
beats.narration: Any business can now buy ads inside ChatGPT directly, without going through an agency.

beats.name: coins-rain-on-the-altar
beats.narration: OpenAI is reportedly targeting two and a half billion dollars in advertising revenue this year.

beats.name: the-oracle-turns-gold
beats.narration: And one hundred billion dollars a year by the end of the decade.

beats.name: the-vow-recarved
beats.narration: The product millions trusted for answers untouched by advertising now sits inside an advertising marketplace.

beats.name: the-open-gate
beats.narration: It is courting everyone from global ad agencies to small businesses that never advertised before.

beats.name: keeper-behind-the-counter
beats.narration: For years, the case for ChatGPT was that no one was buying influence over its answers. Now there is a sales team.
beats.sourceChyron: THE LAST RESORT, NOW THE STORE

sources.attribution: New ways to buy ChatGPT ads (OpenAI)
OpenAI Opens ChatGPT Ads to Self-Service Platform (Adweek)
OpenAI Launches Self-Serve Ads Manager for ChatGPT (Search Engine Journal)
OpenAI opens ChatGPT Ads Manager to all US businesses with CPC bidding (PPC Land)
From 'I hate ads' to 'maybe they don't suck' (Search Engine Land)
OpenAI's CEO said ads were a "last resort" business model (Tubefilter)

transcript: For years, the promise of ChatGPT was a simple one - you came to it for a straight answer. The company argued that was the whole point. You paid for it, so the answers weren't shaped by advertisers. Advertising, by that logic, was a last resort. This year, the last resort arrived. In January, OpenAI began testing ads inside ChatGPT's free tier. This month, it went further and launched a self-serve ad platform. Any business can now buy ads inside ChatGPT directly, without going through an agency. OpenAI is reportedly targeting two and a half billion dollars in advertising revenue this year. And one hundred billion dollars a year by the end of the decade. The product millions trusted for answers untouched by advertising now sits inside an advertising marketplace. It is courting everyone from global ad agencies to small businesses that never advertised before. For years, the case for ChatGPT was that no one was buying influence over its answers. Now there is a sales team.

writing.author: Claude
